2605.23200.title: Adaptive Mass-Segmented KV Compression for Long-Context Reasoning
2605.23200.paper_summary: The linear growth of the Key-Value (KV) cache is a critical bottleneck in long-form LLM inference. Existing KV compression methods mitigate this by evicting tokens based on importance scores. However, we show that their reliance on global Top-k selection triggers Region Wipe-out: the severe eviction of contiguous reasoning blocks that derails logical coherence. To address this, we propose Adaptive Mass-Segmented (AMS) KV Compression, a framework that shifts the paradigm from token-level competition to region-aware quota allocation. AMS adaptively partitions the KV cache based on the spatial distribution of attention mass, ensuring structurally vital reasoning segments receive guaranteed memory quotas. To ensure stability during iterative decoding, an EMA-based smoothing mechanism is incorporated to prevent jitter in segment boundaries. Crucially, AMS is a universal plug-and-play layer that is orthogonal to existing scorers. It can be seamlessly integrated into representative methods such as TOVA, Expected Attention, KeyDiff, R-KV and TriAttention. AMS is also system-compatible with modern paged-KV serving frameworks such as vLLM, supporting efficient gather-and-compact KV execution without introducing additional steady-state attention overhead. Extensive experiments across a diverse suite of tasks, including mathematical reasoning (MATH500, AIME, GSM8K), code completion, open-domain QA, and sparse retrieval, demonstrate that AMS consistently mitigates structural fragmentation and boosts model performance.
2605.23200.paper_summary_zh: 關鍵值（KV）快取的線性增長是長篇 LLM 推理中的一個關鍵瓶頸。現有的 KV 壓縮方法通過根據重要性分數驅逐標記來緩解這一問題。然而，我們顯示它們對全局 Top-k 選擇的依賴會觸發區域清除：嚴重驅逐連續推理塊，破壞邏輯一致性。為了解決這個問題，我們提出了自適應質量分段（AMS）KV 壓縮，這是一個將範式從標記級競爭轉變為區域感知配額分配的框架。AMS 根據注意質量的空間分佈自適應地劃分 KV 快取，確保結構上重要的推理片段獲得保證的內存配額。為了在迭代解碼過程中確保穩定性，還納入了一種基於 EMA 的平滑機制，以防止片段邊界的顫動。關鍵是，AMS 是一個通用的即插即用層，與現有的評分器是正交的。它可以無縫地集成到 TOVA、期望注意、KeyDiff、R-KV 和 TriAttention 等代表性方法中。AMS 也與現代分頁 KV 服務框架如 vLLM 兼容，支持高效的聚集和壓縮 KV 執行，而不會引入額外的穩態注意開銷。對於包括數學推理（MATH500、AIME、GSM8K）、代碼補全、開放領域 QA 和稀疏檢索在內的多樣任務進行的廣泛實驗表明，AMS 一貫減少了結構碎片化並提升了模型性能。
2605.23200.author: Junzhe Yang et.al.
